files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIAction
files.Summary: Represents the types of actions an AI can take.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIDebugVisualizer
files.Summary: Provides visual debugging tools for AI decision-making.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIDecision
files.Summary: Represents a decision made by the AI, including the action and relevant parameters.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIDecisionGenerator
files.Summary: Generates all possible AI actions for evaluation.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIEvaluator
files.Summary: Evaluates and scores AI actions and targets.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIPersonality
files.Summary: Defines different AI personality types that determine decision-making behavior.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.AIUtilities
files.Summary: Static utility methods for AI decision-making.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.AI.EnemyAIBehavior
files.Summary: Base class for enemy AI behaviors. Attach this as a child node to enemy UnitSystem nodes. Encapsulates decision-making logic for a single enemy unit.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.AssassinData
files.Summary: Assassin – Glass cannon unit. Extremely high ATK with low HP and DEF. Specialises in burst damage, execution, and life steal.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.AssassinStab
files.Summary: Enemy Assassin's basic ranged stab (slightly extended reach).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.BasicAttackSkill
files.Summary: Basic ranged attack skill for the archer enemy.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.BladeDance
files.Summary: Blade Dance – Attacks up to 3 adjacent enemies in sequence.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.BloodDrain
files.Summary: Blood Drain – Drains life from the target: deals ATK damage and heals caster for 30%.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.BurningSlash
files.Summary: Burning Slash – Slashes the enemy and applies Burning for 2 turns.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.CircularStrike
files.Summary: Circular Strike – Deals damage to ALL adjacent enemies (AOE melee).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.CleansingLight
files.Summary: Cleansing Light – Removes all status effects from one ally. Currently removes all active effects via the effect list.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.CounterStance
files.Summary: Counter Stance – Boosts own DEF and ATK for 2 turns (self-buff).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.CriticalStrike
files.Summary: Critical Strike – Deals 200% ATK to a single enemy. 3-turn cooldown.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.CrushingStrike
files.Summary: Crushing Strike – Deals heavy damage to a single adjacent enemy. Scaling: 150% of TotalAtk.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.DivinePrayer
files.Summary: Divine Prayer – Boosts ATK of all allies for 3 turns.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.EnemyArcher
files.Summary: Archer enemy unit with ranged attack AI behavior. Uses the existing AI system to make tactical decisions.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.EnemyAssassin
files.Summary: Enemy Assassin – Fast, fragile enemy that poisons and deals burst damage. Mirrors in role and stat profile.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.EnemyBurningSlash
files.Summary: Enemy Swordsman's special: a burning slash with fire damage-over-time.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.EnemyFighter
files.Summary: Enemy Fighter – Melee tank enemy with high HP, DEF, and a stun special. Mirrors in role and stat profile.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.EnemyHealAlly
files.Summary: Enemy Light Mage's special: heals the most wounded ally.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.EnemyLightMage
files.Summary: Enemy Light Mage – Support enemy that heals allies and fires light bolts. Mirrors in role and stat profile. Assigned Defensive personality so the AI prioritises keeping allies alive.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.EnemyPoisonStrike
files.Summary: Enemy Assassin's special: a poison-laced strike (placeholder using BurningEffect). Replace with PoisonEffect when implemented.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.EnemyStaggeringBlow
files.Summary: Enemy Fighter's special: a stun blow that also deals damage.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.EnemySwordsman
files.Summary: Enemy Swordsman – Balanced melee enemy with a burning slash special. Mirrors in role and stat profile.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.ExecutionBlade
files.Summary: Execution Blade – Deals 200% ATK to a target below 30% HP. No bonus if the target is above the threshold.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.FighterData
files.Summary: Fighter – Melee tank unit with high HP and DEF. Excels at absorbing damage and controlling nearby enemies.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.FighterMeleeAttack
files.Summary: Enemy Fighter's melee basic attack.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.HealingTouch
files.Summary: Healing Touch – Restores a flat amount of HP to one ally.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.InstantKill
files.Summary: Instant Kill – Instantly defeats a target below 15% HP. Deals normal ATK damage otherwise.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.LightBolt
files.Summary: Enemy Light Mage's basic magic attack.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.LightMageData
files.Summary: Light Mage – Support/healer unit. Low ATK and DEF but high Intelligence and Mana. Specialises in healing, cleansing, reviving and buffing allies.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Main
files.Summary: Main scene controller that initializes the game systems. Follows the Component-Based Architecture and event-driven communication.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.BaseManager
files.Summary: Base class for all manager singletons in the game. Implements the Manager Pattern from your architecture documentation.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.BattleState
files.Summary: Represents a snapshot of the battle state at a specific moment. Used by AI to make decisions based on current conditions.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.EnemyAIManager
files.Summary: Manages AI decision-making for enemy units during combat. This is NOT a singleton - it's created per battle by GameManager.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.MenuManager
files.Summary: Manages menu navigation and state. Coordinates between different menus following the Manager Pattern.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.SceneManager
files.Summary: The SceneManager handles every inside level related informations.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.SettingsData
files.Summary: Data structure for settings storage

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.SettingsManager
files.Summary: Manages game settings and provides centralized access to configuration options. Follows the Manager Pattern from your architecture.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Managers.TurnManager
files.Summary: Manages the turn-based battle flow between player and enemy units. Handles turn order, state transitions, and async waiting for unit actions.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.PhantomStrike
files.Summary: Phantom Strike – Ranged sword slash that ignores DEF partially. Deals 120% ATK at range 2 with a DEF penetration flavour (implemented as raw damage).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.PoisonBlade
files.Summary: Poison Blade – Deals light damage and applies BurningEffect as a stand-in for Poison (to be replaced with PoisonEffect once implemented).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Resurrection
files.Summary: Resurrection – Revives a fallen ally with 50% HP. Uses OnEffectRevive which checks IsAlive internally.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.SacredRay
files.Summary: Sacred Ray – Deals Light damage to one enemy and heals the first ally in line. Implemented as a targeted damage + self-heal hybrid.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.ShadowStrike
files.Summary: Shadow Strike – Attacks at range 2 from stealth (raw damage, no DEF reduction).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.ShieldBash
files.Summary: Shield Bash – Reduces the target's DEF for 2 turns. Uses a DefDebuffer (simple flat DEF reduction via AtkBuffer pattern on Def stat).

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.StaggeringBlow
files.Summary: Staggering Blow – Deals damage and stuns the target for 1 turn.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.SwordsmanData
files.Summary: Swordsman – Balanced melee unit with solid offense and versatile skills.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.SwordsmanSlash
files.Summary: Enemy Swordsman's basic melee attack.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.BattleInputSystem
files.Summary: Central system responsible for handling player inputs during battle phases.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.CellInformation
files.Summary: Represents the information for a single grid cell in the map, including its coordinates, ground type, walkability, and the unit occupying it.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.EffectTarget<TTarget>
files.Summary: Base class for any entity that can receive and manage s. Provides default implementations for applying, removing, and querying effects.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.IEffectTarget<TTarget>
files.Summary: Represents any entity that can receive and manage s.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.IStatusEffect
files.Summary: Empty interface to be able to contain any status effect as the actual abstract class cannot take object as the TTarget

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.IStatusEffectBehavior
files.Summary: Defines the behavior contract for status effects applied to an entity.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.MapSystem
files.Summary: Base class for all playable maps in the game.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.SkillSystem
files.Summary: Base class for all skills available in the game.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.StatusEffect<TTarget>
files.Summary: Base class for all status effects that can be applied to an .

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.StatusEffectSystem
files.Summary: Manages the lifecycle and application of s for all tracked targets in the game, including units and map cells.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Systems.UnitSystem
files.Summary: Base class for all units in the tactical grid-based system. Handles stats, movement, effects, and Godot integration.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.MainMenu
files.Summary: Main menu controller that handles user interactions and navigation. Implements the Manager Pattern from your architecture documentation.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.UI.Menus.OptionsMenu
files.Summary: Options menu that allows players to configure game settings. Follows the Component-Based Architecture and event-driven communication. Implements the Manager Pattern for centralized settings management.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.CellType
files.Summary: Enumeration of every cell type available in the game.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.ClickOnMapContext
files.Summary: Defines the current interaction mode when clicking on the map.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.EffectType
files.Summary: Defines the type of effect applied by a skill or status effect.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.GameOutcome
files.Summary: Represents the outcome of a battle.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.MagicType
files.Summary: Represents the elemental type of a skill.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.ModifierType
files.Summary: Defines how a numerical modifier affects a value.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.StatTypeWithModifier
files.Summary: Represents a stat that can receive modifiers.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.TargetTypes
files.Summary: Defines the targeting pattern of a skill.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.TurnState
files.Summary: Defines the possible turn states in the battle system.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures.UnitType
files.Summary: Represents the different unit archetypes in the game.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.Utilities.AovDataStructures
files.Summary: Provides shared data structures and enumerations used across the game systems.

files.Title: AshesOfVelsingrad.WarCry
files.Summary: War Cry – Boosts the ATK of all nearby allies for 3 turns.
